perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a nighttime exterior shot of a Daiso department store building in Korea with its bright red logo. (2) A hand is shown holding various skincare products like 'Boncept Retinol Serum' and 'Medipeel Extra Super 9+' in front of store shelves. (3) A close-up split-screen comparison shows a nose with visible blackheads (Before) and a smooth, clean nose (After). (4) A young woman with her hair clipped back appears, holding the products to her face and pointing at her nose. (5) Close-up shots follow, demonstrating the texture of a white gauze strip. (6) The woman applies liquid from a white bottle onto the gauze and then presses the gauze onto her nose. (7) She is then seen applying a green mud mask specifically to the bridge and sides of her nose. (8) She massages the area and eventually washes her face with water. (9) She applies drops of a soothing serum using a pipette and then rubs a white cream onto her nose. (10) The video ends with a side-by-side product display of all items used: Medipeel, Mamonde, Madeca 21, and Boncept.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop track with a catchy melody begins immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voice provides energetic Mandarin narration, introducing the 'Korea Daiso' finds and the 'nose care combination'. (3) The narrator's voice is high-pitched and enthusiastic, guiding the viewer through each step of the skincare routine. (4) Subtle sound effects like 'shimmers' or 'pops' occur during product transitions and text pop-ups. (5) The music stays at a consistent volume, supporting the instructional tone of the narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '韓國大創' (Korea Daiso) - Functional text identifying the location. (2) '超高CP值' (Super high CP value) - Decorative hook text emphasizing affordability. (3) '養鼻組合' (Nose care combo) - Functional title for the tutorial theme. (4) '臺幣400不到' (Less than 400 TWD) - Hook text highlighting the low price. (5) '使用前/使用後' (Before/After) - Functional labels for comparison shots. (6) '第一步' (Step 1), '接著用' (Then use), '3-5分鐘後' (After 3-5 mins) - Functional step-by-step instructions. (7) '貼心提示' (Warm tip) - Friendly hook for advice. (8) '趕快截圖!' (Take a screenshot now!) - Call to action hook at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product reveal -> Step-by-step skincare tutorial -> Results and summary

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing the tutorial; 1 off-screen male narrator.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with light skin, dark hair held back by yellow clips, wearing a brown fuzzy fleece jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts with an urban nighttime street scene featuring a large Daiso building. Shifts to a brightly lit indoor room with shelves and a mirror, typical of a home skincare setting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mixed: Nighttime street lights followed by bright, even indoor studio-like lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.season: Winter (implied by the creator's fuzzy jacket)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step 1 -> Step 2 -> Step 3 -> Result -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a practical shopping guide and skincare tutorial intended to promote specific affordable skincare products available at Daiso in South Korea. By showing immediate 'before and after' results and providing a clear, step-by-step demonstration of a blackhead removal routine, the content aims to convince viewers of the products' effectiveness and high value-for-money.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of brand names, showing prices, and specifically encouraging viewers to 'screenshot' for shopping purposes.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing synchronized with energetic male narration, consistent use of stylized Traditional Chinese overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popularity of 'K-Beauty' and the trend of finding 'dupes' or high-quality cheap finds at Daiso, targeting budget-conscious skincare enthusiasts.
